loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing month-to-date cumulative active and reactive energy for outgoing feeders; specific consumption (SEC) and capacity/target metrics are not measured for this panel.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; roster aggregates PRIMARY members (UPS, BPDB, HHF).

loop1.note: Showing live apparent power and active/reactive components — rated capacity and peak markers are omitted because this asset's nameplate rating is unknown.

loop1.note: Showing UPS and BPDB feeder demand — HHF feeders are not present on this panel (roster match empty).
